reason: behavior_in_task_description and solution_uniqueness_guard are irreconcilably in conflict. Tests directly import 5 private helper functions with exact underscore-prefixed names, exact parameter names (max_chars=500, max_items, max_keys), and exact return signatures (changed, notes tuple). Specifying these in instruction.md to pass behavior_in_task_description constitutes pure solution leakage per solution_uniqueness_guard. The tests prescribe a specific implementation structure that cannot be documented without dictating the solution.
